words.meaning: A record of money at a bank
words.exampleSentence: I opened a bank account today.

words.meaning: Money put into a bank account
words.exampleSentence: He made a deposit of 5000 taka.

words.meaning: Taking money out of a bank
words.exampleSentence: She made a withdrawal at the ATM.

words.meaning: Extra money paid on savings or loans

words.exampleSentence: He took a loan to buy a house.
I withdrew money from the ATM.

words.meaning: Value of one currency in another
words.exampleSentence: Check the exchange rate before travelling.

words.meaning: Amount of money in an account
